description: You are a scheduling coordinator at Northbridge Corp. Create a calendar event in Odoo for a "DevOps Workshop - Infrastructure Modernization" starting the upcoming Wednesday at 9:00 AM and ending the following Thursday at 5:00 PM at the Engineering Lab. Include the description: "Two-day hands-on workshop covering CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and infrastructure as code. Day 1: Theory and architecture. Day 2: Hands-on labs and deployment." Add David Chen and Luis Fernandez as attendees. The event must not be marked as an all-day event and must show specific start and end times. Login credentials: admin / admin
